body.title: Fix MCP request_compaction — move to igor_mcp.py
body.result: Moved request_compaction from dead cc_mcp_server.py (hand-rolled protocol) into igor_mcp.py (real MCP SDK). Tool registered, dispatch wired, tests pass. Needs CC restart to load.
body.description: request_compaction was defined in cc_mcp_server.py using a hand-rolled protocol that Claude Code never loaded. Moved to igor_mcp.py (the real MCP server). cc_mcp_server.py is now dead code.
